name: NRX-055 Baund Doc
pilot: Rosamia Badam Gates Capa Jerid Messa Loren Nakamoto Gawain Oakley
description: Despite its apparent size and bulk, the Baund Doc's Mobile Armor mode was very fast and maneuverable thanks to multiple vernier thrusters and apogee motors. The Baund Doc can transform into an asymmetrical Mobile Suit mode, and this transformable mobile armor's armament consisted of a beam rifle, beam saber, a powerful diffuse mega particle cannon, arm claw and two leg claws. The Baund Doc was also equipped with aPsycommu System, which allowed its pilot to directly interface with the machine's operating system. Although normal human pilots could operate the Baund Doc, its true potential only came out in the hands of aNewtypeor aCyber Newtype. Three Baund Docs were built, although only the first one, theNRX-055-1had a specially-designed cockpit that could seat two individuals, the pilot and an instructor. The second and third units were essentially the same, except they were built with standard single-person cockpits and sported highly distinctive color schemes of blue, yellow and pink.

name: RMS-099 Rick Dias
pilot: Quattro Bajeena Apolly Bay Roberto Emma Sheen Amuro Ray Kamille Bidan Franklin Bidan Asuna Elmarit Jack Bayard Botty Batch Tripper Hodge Souichi Obino Gabriel Zola Baraba [ Thunderbolt ]
description: Developed byAnaheim Electronicsas part of theZeta Project, the RMS-099 Rick Dias was one of the first mass-produced mobile suits deployed by theAEUGin their fight against the corruptTitans. As many engineers who worked on the Rick Dias were formerPrincipality of Zeonmembers, it featured many similarities to Zeon mobile suits such as a mono-eye sensor. It is built out of the newGundarium γ, which was developed by Axis and has strength similar to standardGundariumyet weighs less, making the suit lighter and thus allowing it to accommodate a greater fuel capacity. Because of this, it was originally supposed to be calledγ Gundam(Gamma Gundam), but it was eventually named Rick Dias, a reference to the Portuguese explorerBartolomeu Diaswho first rounded the Cape of Good Hope, and also connotes the fact that AEUG's activities have reached a turning point.

name: AMX-004 Qubeley
pilot: Haman Karn Rita Sue Lapis Zarth Nao Mochizuki
description: The AMX-004 Qubeley is a next generation mobile suit designed forNewtypesthat features numerous technological innovations which allow it to fight on par with other advanced mobile suits that appeared during theGryps Conflictand theFirst Neo Zeon War. Developed from the data gathered from theMS-09R4 Schnee Weissand theAMX-001 Prototype Qubeley, the Qubeley featured four independently movable shoulder binders, two binders per shoulder, to assist in AMBAC (Active Mass Balance Auto Control), granting phenomenal mobility. Though lacking the full range of motion as the arms and legs, these binders bring the Qubeley's total number of movable limbs up to eight. Furthermore, these binders also contain the Qubeley's primary thrusters.

description: The Qubeley Mass Production Type shared many characteristics with its predecessors, the Qubeley Mk-II units, with the main difference being that the Mass Production Type had much greater offensive capabilities. Unlike its predecessors, the Qubeley Mass Production Type is equipped with a pair of movable active cannons mounted on its back. Additionally, it also carries 30 remote controlled weaponry known as "Funnels", which is 3 times greater that of its predecessors. Due to the increased mass from the additional weapons, the Qubeley Mass Production Type could only achieve a maximum acceleration of 0.99 G which is less than the max acceleration of its predecessors and is the only area of performance where the mobile suit is inferior. This acceleration speed also made it one of the slowest mobile suits fielded during theFirst Neo Zeon War. The Qubeley Mass Production Type also lacks thepsycommucontroller headset used in the AMX-004-3 Qubeley Mk-II.

SinceNeo Zeonlost the ability to manufacture Psycho-Frame following theSecond Neo Zeon War, the Kshatriya became a one-off unit.Another factor that contributed to its miniaturization was that most of its functions are concentrated in its four wings/binders.As a result, the Kshatriya was almost half the size of its predecessor. The four massive wings/binders are also the Kshatriya's greatest features, each containing two mega particle cannons, a funnel container with six funnels, an I-Field generator, flexible thrusters, a propellant tank, and a sub-arm equipped with a small beam saber.Each wing/binder also serves as an AMBAC unit.Like its predecessor, the Kshatriya requires a powerfulNewtypepilot.

It was developed as an all-purpose attack machine, capable of operating both in space and in the atmosphere. Like theMSZ-006 Zeta Gundam, the Delta Plus was capable of transforming into a Wave Rider Mode with the ability to enter the atmosphere unassisted. The Wave Rider Mode's thrust was high enough to not only achieve atmospheric flight, but also serve as aSub-Flight Systemfor another mobile suit under 1G of gravity.

Its design is a combination of the firepower aspect of the Wing Gundam Zero with an emphasis on overwhelming suppressive fire. Its overall firepower is comparable to 3 to 5 battleships', but its attack power drops drastically once it run out of ammunition. It is the only unit among the five prototypes created under the Alliance'sG Projectto use the X200 series frame that is designed to support special systems; in this case, theMirage Colloid Stealth Systemthat renders the Blitz invisible to both sensors and the naked eye. The suit is painted mainly black to enhance the effectiveness of the stealth system and is fitted with other systems to ensure the silent operation of internal mechanisms and systems, as well as to control the heat dissipation while cloaked. Like the other four units, Blitz is equipped with thePhase Shift armorsystem, but unlike them, it does not have any built-in weaponry like theCIWS. Its armaments are all arm-mounted and consists of a grappling claw and an offensive shield system, which mounts both beam and non-beam weapons for melee and ranged combat.

name: GN-001 Gundam Exia
description: Specializing in close combat and armed mainly with melee weapons, the Gundam Exia is one of four Gundams deployed in AD 2307 by the paramilitary organization,Celestial Being, to eliminate world conflicts through armed interventions.To fight against the world with their small numbers and win, these Gundams have overwhelming power and equipped with advanced technology a century ahead of its time.Notably, the semi-perpetualGN Drivemounted in the center of the Gundams provide almost limitless energy and generates special, multifunctionalGN Particles.The GN Particles grant outstanding mobility, including independent flight capabilities, and are also utilized for beam weaponry, attitude control, and stealth purposes as the discharged particles can cause electromagnetic interference, leaving conventional communication and radar devices useless.The Gundams also share common aspects with conventional mobile suits, such as the use ofE-Carbonfor its armor material.However, the Gundams' E-Carbon has higher defensive power due to the use of advanced materials.

description: In AD 2307, the paramilitary organization,Celestial Being, deployed four third-generation Gundams with the objective of eradicating world conflicts through armed interventions.The Gundam Kyrios is one of them and its most prominent feature is a transformation mechanism for switching between MS Form (also known as "MS Mode") and Flight Form (also known as "Flight Mode", "Flight Position") which was tested by its predecessor, the second-generationGNY-003 Gundam Abulhool.The Kyrios' mobility and maneuverability are greatly enhanced in Flight Form, exceeding those of the other Gundams and mobile suits utilized by the three major powers.The transformation mechanism also grants high operability, allowing Kyrios to carry another mobile suit on top during Flight Form and a partial transformation where its upper body turns into that of the MS Form's is also possible.Like its fellow Gundams, Kyrios has a semi-perpetualGN Drivein the center of its body that provides almost limitless energy and produces special, multifunctionalGN Particles.

description: A heavily armed and armored mobile suit, the Gundam Virtue has the highest offensive and defensive power among the third generation Gundams deployed in AD 2307 by theCelestial Being, a paramilitary organization aiming to eliminate world conflicts through armed interventions.Specializing in artillery warfare for fleet battles and assaulting enemy strongholds, the Virtue's firepower is unmatched among contemporaries thanks to heavy beam weaponry, consisting of a GN Bazooka and two GN Cannons.As Virtue is not meant for anti-mobile suit combat, its only melee weapon is a pair of GN Beam Sabers.Due to its large size, Virtue's mobility and evasive capabilities are lower than the other Gundams, but these weakness are mitigated by its high defensive strength in the form of heavy armor and the ability to generate a 360-degreeGN Fieldbarrier around itself that can nullify most physical and beam attacks.

description: The GN-0000 00 Gundam was one of the new Gundams developed byCelestial Beingafter the paramilitary organization was defeated by theUN Forcesin AD 2308.It was made specifically forSetsuna F. Seiei, thus it was designed based on his previous mobile suit, theGN-001 Gundam Exia, and reflected Exia's performance data.Although Setsuna's whereabouts were unknown at the time of the 00's development, his Celestial Being comrades continued developing the mobile suit as they believed he would return.Deployed in AD 2312 following Setsuna's return and as Celestial Being made a comeback after four years of silence, the 00's most prominent feature is theTwin Drive Systemthat comprised two originalGN Drives.By synchronizing the two GN Drives, the Twin Drive System causes the resultingGN Particleoutput to be squared that of a single GN Drive rather than merely doubled.With this immense amount of GN Particles, the 00 was expected to have exceptional combat capabilities.The theory behind the Twin Drive System was developed by the founder of Celestial Being,Aeolia Schenberg, and hidden in the quantum processing systemVeda.This theory was eventually sent to Celestial Being at the same time as theTrans-Am System.

description: Produced at the end of theCalamity War, the V08-1228 Grimgerde is one of the mobile suit models that used theValkyrja Frame.The Valkyrja frame was easy to use, lightweight, and compared to the other Calamity War era machines, its design was simple with minimal energy loss.In terms of specifications, the Valkyrja Frame had the capabilities to be the main combat machine on the battlefield.However, as it was developed at around the same time as theGundam Frame, not many people were aware of its existence.Based on remaining data from the Calamity War era, the overall production number for Valkyrja Frame-based mobile suits was small, with a theory that less than 10 units were produced.There was also not much information regarding their combat record.

name: XVX-016RN Gundam Aerial Rebuild
description: Following the team-duel with Grassley House which saw the Gundam Aerial incur heavy damage, it was sent back to the Shin Sei Development Corporation in order to be repaired. They proceeded to overhaul the suit into the XVX-016RN Gundam Aerial Rebuild. The Aerial Rebuild now has its own built in thruster backpack, removing the need for equipment like the Mirasoul Flight Unit for maneuvering in space. In addition, the armor on the upper body is now a darker blue color, rather than the light blue seen on the original Gundam Aerial.

description: Developed as a proof-of-concept for Jeturk Heavy Machinery's 5th generation of mobile suits, the MD-0064 Darilbalde was produced prioritizing adaptation of next-gen military drone technology to a mobile suit, featuringUnmanned Drone Technology.When adapting a drone equipped with Decision Making Extension AI capable of self-learning and autonomous operation to a humanoid mobile suit, the team attempted to add fundamental kinesthetic integration to the unit.The Darilbalde does not feature the revolutionary technology of the GUND FORMAT in its design.However, unlike the Gundams that utilize "cursed" technology, this unit prides itself as a legitimate evolution of the mobile suit as a platform.

name: AGE-1 Gundam AGE-1 Normal
pilot: Flit Asuno Desil Galette Asemu Asuno Largan Drace (Unit 2)
description: Holder of the mobile suit name "Gundam" that belong to alegendary savior, the Gundam AGE-1 Normal is the prized possession of the Asuno Family and is pivotal in the fight against theUE. Developed through the data stored in theAGE Devicepassed down within the Asuno family, the AGE-1 incorporates a special OS, the AGE System which can gather data and come up with equipment to counter a specific enemy. Its basic weaponry includes beam sabers/daggers, a shield and a new weapon called the DODS Rifle that was developed by the AGE System during one of the Gundam's earlier battles against the UE. Using "wear parts" created by the AGE System through theAGE Builder, the AGE-1 can take on other forms such as the fasterSpallow formand the heavierTitus form. Unlike other mass-produced mobile suits of theEarth Federation Forcesin AG 114, the Gundam's armor is strong enough to withstand attacks from anOvv-f Gafran.

description: A next generation Gundam built based on the combat data of the Gundam AGE-1, and it also incorporated data of Asemu's battles in Tordia.The AGE-2 Gundam AGE-2 Normal is the second Gundam built using theAGE Systemand is designed as a high-speed combat unit, able to transform into aStrider Form(also referred to as "G-Strider"), a fighter-like form which flies at three times the speed of its MS mode.In this form, AGE-2 is capable of atmospheric entry.The repulsive force propulsion technology found in theAGE-1S Gundam AGE-1 Spallowis applied to the shoulder-mounted moveable wings.As AGE-2 was developed for Asemu, he can pilot it more fluently than the AGE-1.

name: AGE-FX Gundam AGE-FX
description: The AGE-FX Gundam AGE-FX was developed from combat data of the Gundam AGE-3 following the latter's defeat in theMars Sphere. It reflects all the data regarding the Gundam's evolution, boasting the most powerful fighting strength in the history of allAdvanced Generationmobile suits.Like the Gundam AGE-3, the Gundam AGE-FX's backpack can separate and function as a Core Fighter. Unlike Gundam AGE-3's Core Fighter, where it serves as its head, core control system and the main propulsion system, Gundam AGE-FX's Core Fighter only has the last two functions. The wear system used in previous Gundams is completely removed, and the mobile suit is made as light as possible for increased maneuverability.

pilot: Garrod Ran Jamil Neate Kai Rick Aller Mana K2 [MSG ALIVE]
description: The GX-9900 Gundam X was a Gundam Type mobile suit - a decisive battle weapon developed by United Nations Earth, equipped with theFlash System.Its greatest weapon was the Satellite Cannon, a beam cannon with enough power to destroy a space colony with a single shot, powered by Super Microwave (SMW) launched from a solar power facility on the lunar surface. Power from the SMW was stored in the backpack and  a series of energy conductors spread all over the GX's body, and the backpack could also provide energy for the Gundam's other weapons, such as beam sword and rifle. Because of this, when conducting combat without firing the Satellite Cannon, the Gundam X could continue fighting for up to a week without resupplying.

description: The GX-9900-DV Gundam X Divider was developed from theGX-9900 Gundam XbyKid Salsamilleafter it suffered a devastating defeat against theRMSN-008 Bertigo. The majority of the Gundam X's equipment was heavily damaged, and it was not feasible for Kid to restore the mobile suit to its original configuration. So he opted to do a make-over, using a collection of spare parts as well as salvaged equipment he collected over the years. After he completed all major repairs and enhancements, he named it as Gundam X Divider, after its new shield.

name: GF13-001NHII Master Gundam
description: A state-of-the-art mobile fighter made by Neo Hong Kong, and a developmental improvement of the Kowloon Gundam. Its body is made up of DG cells, allowing it to disguise itself as the Kowloon Gundam. Although its body is made up of DG cells, it is completely controlled by Master Asia's strong mental power, so it does not self-propagate or self-evolve, and uses its abilities only for self-regeneration. This machine has strong characteristics as a dedicated fighting machine developed from the Kowloon Gundam, and its flexible joint structure and thrusters allow it to move in a variety of ways, reproducing many of the techniques of Master Asia. It is a member of the Devil Gundam Legion, and is treated as the leader of the Four Heavenly Kings subgroup that consisted of four Gundams.

description: Developed by the space colony of Neo China, the Dragon Gundam is assigned to Sai Saici, the young heir to the martial arts traditions of the legendary Shaolin Temple. This mobile fighter is both agile and highly adaptable, able to fight in any environment from sandy deserts to the depths of the ocean. In addition to the extendable, fire-breathing Dragon Claws built into its forearms, the Dragon Gundam is armed with twelve Feilong Flags - multipurpose beam weapons which can be used to pin down enemies, and also function as both spears and protective shields. Perhaps its sneakiest weapon is the dagger-tipped queue attached to its head, a close-range weapon which has taken more than one foe by surprise.

description: By using the Mobile Trace System, the Maxter Gundam is capable of fully performing Chibodee's boxing fighting style to attack. When the Maxter Gundam is equipped with its fighting knuckles its ultimate attack is its Cyclone Punch, a punching attack that unleashes a swirling vortex of wind. Against more powerful opponents Chibodee has his Gundam enter Boxing mode, purging the front chest armor (revealing a muscular-like inner armor) and using the Gundam's shoulder armor as punching gloves. With the gloves equipped, Gundam Maxter can unleash its ultimate attack: Burning Punch, a punching technique that launches a powerful stream of fire. Later Chibodee will develop a new ultimate attack, the Gounetsu Machine Gun Punch, a rapid punching attack that overwhelms his opponents.
